mechanism_summary: I2S intercepts the switch CMP callback, logs the EM_X86_64 constant 0x3e, and substitutes it into the e_machine field at the matching input offset, directly planting the exact 2-byte value that blind havoc almost never generates.
one_line: I2S substitutes EM_X86_64 constant 0x3e into ELF e_machine field

mechanism_summary: VP adds CMP_MAP buckets keyed by Hamming-distance to the EM_X86_64 constant; each input whose e_machine value is closer to 0x3e than any prior input is preserved as a stepping-stone, climbing the gradient to the exact value.
one_line: VP Hamming gradient climbs e_machine field toward EM_X86_64 constant

mechanism_summary: I2S reads the libpng chunk-type CMP buffer, finds the chunk-type offset in the input, and substitutes the exact 4-byte 'sPLT' tag, causing png_handle_sPLT to allocate splt_palettes and making the non-null pointer gate true.
one_line: I2S substitutes sPLT chunk-type tag so splt_palettes is allocated non-null

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP distance-bucket feedback rewards inputs whose chunk-type bytes are progressively closer to 'sPLT'; partial prefix matches are retained as new buckets, guiding havoc to the full 4-byte tag that plain naive coverage cannot sense.
one_line: VP CMP_MAP prefix gradient assembles sPLT chunk-type tag for non-null gate

mechanism_summary: I2S intercepts chunk-type/CRC CMP operands from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes expected chunk literals into matching input offsets, clearing chunk-validation comparisons that naive must satisfy by chance; confirmed by I2S-floor dash-row ancestor.
one_line: I2S substitutes chunk literals enabling chunk parsing so num != -1 is reached

mechanism_summary: VP CMP_MAP records a Hamming/prefix-distance bucket per chunk-field CMP; inputs whose fields are closer to matching the expected values earn new buckets and are retained, giving a gradient toward valid chunk structures that plain edge coverage lacks.
one_line: VP gradient climbs chunk-field comparisons toward valid parsing to reach num != -1

mechanism_summary: I2S reads color_type==N and bit_depth CMP operands from the CmpLogObserver buffer and substitutes the exact enum values into input bytes at offsets 0x18/0x19, planting the forbidden combination (palette with bit_depth>8 or non-palette with bit_depth<8) that random mutation rarely produces.
one_line: I2S plants exact color_type/bit_depth enum pair for the forbidden IHDR combination

mechanism_summary: VP CMP_MAP records operand-distance buckets for color_type==N and bit_depth comparisons; inputs whose operand pair is closer to the disallowed combination earn new buckets and are retained, letting VP climb toward the exact forbidden pairing that naive's edge-only feedback discards.
one_line: VP gradient climbs toward exact forbidden color_type/bit_depth pairing

mechanism_summary: I2S intercepts the chunk_name==png_sPLT integer compare, logs both operands, and substitutes the constant sPLT FOURCC bytes into the input at the matching chunk-name offset; random havoc cannot brute-force the exact 4-byte magic.
one_line: I2S substitutes 4-byte sPLT FOURCC constant into chunk-name field

mechanism_summary: VP CMP_MAP prefix-distance feedback preserves each input whose chunk_name has more matching bytes to the sPLT FOURCC constant than any prior input, giving a hill-climbing gradient to the full 4-byte match that naive's edge-only feedback cannot follow.
one_line: VP gradient climbs chunk_name byte-by-byte toward sPLT FOURCC match

mechanism_summary: I2S reads the CmpLogObserver buffer recording the switch comparison color_type vs case constant 3, finds the loser's color_type byte in the input, and substitutes the constant 3 at offset 0x19, directly solving the switch-case equality that naive cannot reach by blind havoc.
one_line: I2S substitutes constant 3 at color_type byte to take PALETTE switch case

mechanism_summary: VP CMP_MAP records the operand-distance bucket between color_type and case constant 3; an input whose color_type byte is Hamming-closer to 3 than any prior adds a new bucket and is preserved as corpus, giving a gradient toward 0x03 that naive's bare edge feedback lacks.
one_line: VP gradient walks color_type byte toward constant 3 for PALETTE switch case

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the 1-byte CMP at line 276 via __sanitizer_cov_trace_cmp1, logs constant operand 3, then substitutes it into the color_type byte, deterministically placing PNG_COLOR_TYPE_PALETTE where naive must blind-mutate.
one_line: I2S substitutes constant 0x03 into IHDR color_type byte

mechanism_summary: value_profile writes the CUR==0x03 distance into a CMP_MAP bucket; inputs whose color_type byte is Hamming-closer to constant 3 add a new bucket and are retained, building a gradient toward the exact match that naive's edge-only feedback cannot follow.
one_line: VP gradient climbs Hamming distance toward color_type == 0x03

mechanism_summary: I2SRandReplace intercepts the CUR==0 integer CMP, reads the constant operand 0 from the CmpLogObserver buffer, and substitutes 0x00 at the input offset feeding the cursor, directly synthesizing the NUL byte naive must stumble onto by blind havoc.
one_line: I2S places NUL byte 0x00 at parse cursor satisfying CUR==0

mechanism_summary: value_profile's CMP_MAP records the operand-distance bucket for CUR==0; an input whose cursor byte is Hamming-closer to 0 than any prior input adds a new bucket and is retained, building a gradient that drives the byte down to exactly 0x00.
one_line: VP gradient drives cursor byte Hamming-downward toward NUL

mechanism_summary: I2S reads CmpLogObserver entries from integer-token comparisons in the parser/codegen and substitutes digit and arithmetic-operator bytes (0x35, 0x2b, 0x2f, 0x2d) into the input, building the densely-repeated literal-expression body that drives codeInteger's true branch.
one_line: I2S plants repeated digit and operator bytes to densely populate codeInteger true branch

mechanism_summary: VP's CMP_MAP Hamming gradient preserves seeds that bring integer-literal comparisons closer to matching, incrementally accumulating the digit and operator byte pattern the codegen branch requires.
one_line: VP gradient accumulates integer-literal operator bytes for codeInteger true branch
